query:
SELECT 'field_visits' as tbl, agentName, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM field_visits GROUP BY agentName
UNION ALL
SELECT 'fr_expenses', agentName, COUNT(*) FROM fr_expenses GROUP BY agentName
UNION ALL
SELECT 'bdr_expenses', agentName, COUNT(*) FROM bdr_expenses GROUP BY agentName
UNION ALL
SELECT 'fr_errands', agentName, COUNT(*) FROM fr_errands GROUP BY agentName
UNION ALL
SELECT 'referral_rewards', agentName, COUNT(*) FROM referral_rewards GROUP BY agentName
UNION ALL
SELECT 'referral_tracker', bdrAssigned, COUNT(*) FROM referral_tracker GROUP BY bdrAssigned
ORDER BY tbl, agentName;
